goal: Expose state graph DeepSeek protocol check, eval, decision, event, and relation provenance metadata as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human protocol report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Protocol graph reports expose DeepSeek protocol coverage to humans, but release and promotion automation cannot reliably inspect protocol check coverage and relation provenance without parsing formatted text.
